entry.key: Permit Whitespace and Comments in Pattern

value.name: Permit Whitespace and Comments in Pattern

entry.key: Enable Literal Parsing of the Pattern

value.name: Enable Literal Parsing of the Pattern

entry.key: Permit Whitespace and Comments in Pattern
Enable Literal Parsing of the Pattern

entry.value: SELECT crime_id, date_id, ROUND(longitude,5) AS longitude, ROUND(latitude,5) AS latitude, location, lsoa_code, lsoa_name, crime_type, last_outcome_category FROM FLOWFILE

entry.key: Max Length To Put In Attribute

value.name: Max Length To Put In Attribute

entry.key: Max Length To Put In Attribute

entry.value: SELECT Crime_ID as crime_id, date_id as date_id, Longitude AS longitude, Latitude AS latitude, Location AS location, LSOA_code AS lsoa_code, LSOA_name AS lsoa_name, Crime_type AS crime_type, Last_outcome_category AS last_outcome_category FROM FLOWFILE WHERE crime_id IS NOT NULL AND latitude IS NOT NULL AND longitude IS NOT NULL LIMIT 200
